nasb.text: Then his servants carried him in a chariot to Jerusalem and buried him in his grave with his fathers in the city of David.

esv.text: His servants carried him in a chariot to Jerusalem, and buried him in his tomb with his fathers in the city of David.

cnv.text: 他的臣僕用車把他的屍體送到耶路撒冷，葬在大衛城他自己的墳墓，和他的祖先一同長眠。

ccb.text: 他的臣仆用车把他的尸体运回耶路撒冷，安葬在大卫城他的祖坟里。
